verified_foundations: Deterministic exact-byte operational certificate issuance and direct certificate scope validation exist.
Complete-map hard veto and multi-person ownership/scope guards exist and cannot be replaced by an advisory critic vote.
The intelligence control plane records critic quorum and typed disagreement without granting higher authority.
Bounded repair foundations enforce iteration, provenance, output-change and safety constraints.
The signed invalidation taxonomy/event contract and legacy single-/multi-person lowering foundations exist.
Single- and multi-person authority-scope unit coverage is present.

commands: python -m pytest -q tests/test_autonomous_repair.py tests/test_binary_review_decisions.py tests/test_intelligence_control_plane.py tests/test_autonomy_multi_person_scope.py plus focused bridge invalidation/event tests

known_precedence_failure.meaning: The MF-P6-08.05 policy binding currently masks a direct certificate-integrity failure; direct certificate integrity must precede policy binding, which must precede advisory critic logic.

existing_repair_evidence_review.reason: The shadow evidence does not prove autonomous typed abstention and does not bind accepted, repaired, abstained, certified and revoked single-/multi-person branches into one governed report.

missing_acceptance: Correct MF-P6-08.05 certificate/policy/critic precedence without weakening direct integrity or hard-veto authority.
Complete MF-P6-08.06 bounded repair with a typed autonomous abstention terminal state and no residual mandatory-human queue in the default autonomous path.
Complete MF-P6-08.07 at-use signed invalidation authority decisions against the current trusted journal head.
Run governed single- and multi-person inputs through one deterministic candidate-to-QA-to-repair-or-abstain-to-certificate-to-revocation demonstration.
Publish one hash-bound report proving accepted, repaired, abstained, certified and revoked cases and zero hard-veto bypass.

future_additive_scope_candidate.worker_lane_boundary: Do not duplicate or dispatch while worker lanes remain disabled and MF-P6-08.05 through MF-P6-08.07 are unresolved.

claim_boundary: This audit supports honest partial progress only. It does not demonstrate the complete autonomous flow, certify or revoke a production output, approve a mask, complete MF-P6-08.08, or claim autonomous-gold production readiness.
